'''dhashada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pwner|pwner]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-sh-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pwner|pwner]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| dhashada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || dhæshædæth || dhæshædæj || dhæshædæsh || dhæshædæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || dhashashadath || dhashashadaj || dhashashadash || dhashashada
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || dhashadath || dhashadaj || dhashadash || dhashada
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || dhashafdafth || dhashafdafj || dhashafdafsh || dhashafdaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || dhashadatha || dhashadaja || dhashadasha || dhashadaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || dhashadath || dhashadaj || dhashadash || dhashada
|-
| [[Possessive]] || dhashadathal || dhashadajal || dhashadashal || dhashadakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || dhashadaathatha || dhashadaajaja || dhashadaashasha || dhashadaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || dhashadathan || dhashadajan || dhashadashan || dhashadakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || dhashadathaoro || dhashadajaoro || dhashadashaoro || dhashadakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
